scripts.build:credit-card: node ./node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc -b packages/core packages/compiler packages/cli && node packages/cli/dist/index.js build --input test/CreditCard.svg --width-tokens test/Width --style-tokens test/Style --out-dir output/CreditCard --name CreditCard
scripts.build:icons: node ./node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc -b packages/core packages/compiler packages/cli && node packages/cli/dist/index.js build --input test --width-tokens test/Width --style-tokens test/Style --out-dir output
scripts.check: pnpm lint && pnpm test && pnpm build
